summary: Disambiguation field added to colliding skills. Brand-snapshot digest system. Update mechanism bootstrap.
notes: Safe overlay release. Zero impact on operator data. Post-update: regenerate manifest and brand snapshots.

changes.note: Skills section gains disambiguation tie-breaker rule. Context DB section points at brand snapshot first. Mutation rule mandates snapshot rebuild after core file writes.
Manifest generator captures disambiguates_against and hyphenated keys.
New script. Generates brands/{slug}/_snapshot.md per brand.
disambiguates_against field added to frontmatter on 5 skills with trigger collisions.
Template version registry. Read by update-workspace at install and on update.
Update doctrine for maintainers. How to publish clean releases.
Orchestrator skill. Applies update manifests. Delegates schema bumps to migrate-workspace.
